package.name: cartographer_slam
package.description: Layer 3 stretch: launch-only package wrapping Google Cartographer for genuinely odometry-free 2D LIDAR SLAM. Built after the chassis crack made wheel-encoder odometry (wheel_odometry package) unreliable -- see CLAUDE.md. Unlike the earlier slam_toolbox_lidar_only.yaml attempt (frozen identity odom->base_link transform, which stalled slam_toolbox's scan gating after one scan), Cartographer's own trajectory builder estimates motion directly from consecutive LIDAR scans (use_odometry = false in cartographer_lidar_only.lua), so it needs no external motion source, wheel-based or otherwise.
